words.hint: A surprise test the teacher springs on you with no warning
A period where you sit quietly and supposedly do work
The big formal dance at the end of senior year
The fall dance usually tied to a football game
The student with the highest GPA who gives a speech at graduation
Advanced Placement courses that can earn college credit
International Baccalaureate — the overachiever's diploma program
Where you eat lunch and perform the social ritual of finding a table
The permission slip you need to leave class to go to the bathroom
Your personal metal cubby in the hallway for books and shame
The week before Homecoming when everyone dresses according to daily themes
The college entrance exam that haunts junior year
The other college entrance exam with a science section
The stressful essays and forms you fill out senior fall
The cumulative tests at the end of the semester worth a huge chunk of your grade
A school assignment where one person does all the work and everyone gets the same grade
A guest teacher who has no control and you get nothing done
Standing in front of everyone and talking about your project
Punishment where you stay after school sitting in silence
School cancelled because of too much snow — the best day of the year
Everyone files outside because an alarm went off — usually a false alarm
The kid who makes everyone laugh and the teacher hate them
The kid who does everything the teacher says and tells on everyone
Copying someone else's words or work and presenting it as your own
The elected student body that plans events and pretends to have power
Students perform acts on stage for the whole school
A theatrical production with auditions and weeks of rehearsal
The annual book with everyone's photos that you get signed at the end of the year
The list of students with high enough grades posted publicly
The adult at school who helps you with college plans and mental health
The day you go somewhere educational instead of sitting in class
The questionable food served by the cafeteria on a revolving menu
The rules about what clothing you can wear to school
The person who does extra credit no one asked for and ruins the curve
The slip you get when you arrive to class after the bell
The class where you change into PE clothes and run laps
A game where you throw rubber balls at your classmates
You make a tri-fold poster board about an experiment and stand next to it
The lab in biology class that makes half the class queasy
Optional bonus work that can raise your grade above 100%
The ceremony where you get your diploma and toss your cap in the air
Your numeric position among all students based on GPA
Being marked late to class in the attendance system
A class you choose for yourself like art, drama, or cooking
The club sells homemade goods to raise money
An event or activity to raise money for a school club or trip
The exams you take halfway through the semester
A free period in your schedule with no class assigned
The daily broadcast over the intercom with schedule updates and clubs
Everyone gathers in the gymnasium or auditorium for a school-wide event
The 5-minute gap between classes where everyone rushes to their locker
A hidden piece of paper with notes to use on a test illegally
